title: DracoMon [Cobblemon]
description: Adds Goodra + Salamence + Hydreigon lines to Cobblemon.
body:
This is an Add-On for Cobblemon.

The current official version of the mod is missing a few dragons! this add-on adds a few more pokemon. Install datapack as a datapack and resourcepack to Cobblemon.

Spawning!

Goodra Line- Spawns in swamps during the rain or in lush caves with varying rarity. Hisuian variants spawn in mangrove swamps with increased chances when above Y+80. (Goomy can evolve into hisuian sliggoo if you feed it mangrove roots at Lvl.40.) Salamence Line- Spawns on mountains with varying rarity, stony cliffs greatly increase chances. Hydreigon Line- Spawns in Dripstone Caves, and in Dark Oak Forests/Mountains at night. Noivern Line- Spawns in Dark Oak Forests at night, and in Caves. Drampa- Spawns in very rarely in Villages with a higher chance near mountains.

-=Installation=-

Put Dracomon_[version_#] into your resourcepacks folder and your datapacks folder. If using Lostmons download the optional resource pack without salamence for insured compatability. Salamence spawns will not be affected.

Extras!

Server use is untested. Make sure to enable the resource pack. :] ...thank you to the Cobblemon Discord server for your help and support!
